# How to use the WordPress editor the right way (& Save Time)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-05-17 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 764

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Struggling with WordPress block editor?

I often see users looking for plugins to extend the WordPress
editor without realizing the features they wanted have already
been built into their editor.

If you want to get things done quickly and save time, you'll need
to know how to use the WordPress block editor the right way.

🔓 (FREE GUIDE) Unlock Your WordPress Editor's Full Potential 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YeIowJu_qAReKvmdKv8OrwOPynuZ6-ZQcSspedseoqM )


Here's what you'll find in the guide:

- WordPress editor essentials: A walkthrough to help you learn
basic features

- Hidden gems: Use the editor like a seasoned pro! (This is how I
use the Editor)

- Keyboard shortcuts: Learn the shortcuts that help you save
time.

Remember, you already have these features... You just need to
know where to look. Go ahead and check out the guide 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YeIowJu_qAReKvmdKv8OrwOPynuZ6-ZQcSspedseoqM )
 now.
